requires.rationale: assertion has time-ordered run history with pass/fail states

structure.description: Validation tab renders each assertion as a horizontal timeline of pass/fail dots over time. Click on a run reveals failure detail. Assertion is itself an entity with its own history, not a snapshot boolean.

rationale.hypothesis: Knowing 'is the assertion failing now' is less useful than 'how flaky has it been'. Timeline of pass/fail makes flakiness, recent regression, and stable success visually distinct.

evidence.description: Assertion history as timeline of green/red dots

counterexample.description: If check runs once and is discarded, timeline is meaningless
